steps.title: Identify the inputs
steps.content: The function $s(t)$ gives the mass that remains after $t$ years. Therefore, $s(58)$ describes the remaining mass after $58$ years.

steps.title: Interpret the statement
steps.content: The statement $s(58)=46$ means the remaining mass is $46$ grams when the time is $58$ years. The answer is A.
